title: Stocks Fall as Trump Puts Mideast Back in Focus: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 特朗普将中东重新置于焦点之中，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: Stocks fell, bond yields spiked and oil rallied after President Donald Trump thrust geopolitical risks back into focus by declaring the ceasefire between the US and Iran to be over.

title: European Bonds Slide as Oil Spike Reignites Inflation Fears
title_cn: 石油飙升再次引发通胀担忧，欧洲债券下滑
summary: European bonds slumped, sending French borrowing costs to their highest since 2009, as oil prices and inflation expectations rose after President Donald Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran.

title: S&P Dow Jones Warns of Potential Frontier-Market Cut for Turkey
title_cn: 标准普尔道琼斯警告土耳其可能削减前沿市场
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices has put Turkey on a watchlist for a potential cut to frontier-market status, joining MSCI Inc. in warning of downgrades.

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Drop as Iran Escalation Adds to AI Risks
title_cn: 伊朗局势升级加剧人工智能风险，新兴市场股市下跌
summary: Emerging-market stocks dropped as an escalation in the Middle East conflict added to the ongoing rotation out of AI beneficiaries.

title: China Cites Trump Remarks in Rare Criticism of US Taiwan Envoy
title_cn: 中国罕见批评美国台湾特使，引用特朗普言论
summary: China took the rare step of publicly criticizing the top US diplomat in Taiwan, invoking select remarks by President Donald Trump to argue that the envoy’s actions are destabilizing relations.

title: UK Carpet Maker Victoria Signs Deal With Left-Behind Bondholders
title_cn: 英国地毯制造商维多利亚与留守债券持有人签署协议
summary: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc and a group of bondholders left behind in an earlier debt deal have struck an agreement over a balance sheet restructuring.

title: Nvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boom Levels
title_cn: Nvidia 的 1 万亿美元下滑使估值达到人工智能繁荣之前的水平
summary: After losing roughly $1 trillion in market value in less than two months, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is the cheapest it’s been since before the AI boom kicked off and sent the shares into the stratosphere.

title: Oil Extends Gains After Trump Says Ceasefire With Iran Is Over
title_cn: 特朗普表示与伊朗的停火结束后油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil jumped after US President Donald Trump said the tentative ceasefire with Iran is over, raising the prospect of a fresh round of conflict in one of the world’s most important energy-producing regions.

title: China Allowing Major Exports of Diesel and Gasoline This Month
title_cn: 中国本月允许大量出口柴油和汽油
summary: Chinese oil refiners have been granted more permits to export gasoline, diesel and jet fuel this month, according to people familiar with the matter, in a major relaxation of restrictions imposed during the Iran war.

title: Bonds Show Vulnerability to Iran Setback: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 债券显示出伊朗受挫的脆弱性：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aselsan CEO Says Global Defense Orders Are Surging
title_cn: Aselsan首席执行官表示全球防务订单正在激增
summary: Turkey’s $37 billion state-run defense contractor Aselsan Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret AS said international orders have doubled in the past year on the back of demand fueled by the conflicts in Ukraine and the Middle East. Aselsan CEO Ahmet Akyol spoke Tuesday with Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet Powers 44% Jump in India Foreign Investment, UN Says
title_cn: 联合国表示，Alphabet 推动印度外国投资猛增 44%
summary: Foreign direct investment in India surged in 2025, driven largely by Alphabet Inc.’s data center project, though a decline in greenfield investments signaled a weaker investment outlook, according to the United Nations’ trade agency.

title: China’s 10-Year Bond Sale Sees Demand Gauge at Record High
title_cn: 中国十年期债券发行需求量创历史新高
summary: A gauge of demand for an auction of China’s benchmark sovereign bonds touched an all-time high on Wednesday, indicating strong appetite for the securities.

title: India Fat-Loss Drug Sales Slow After Early Spike From Generics
title_cn: 印度减肥药销售在仿制药早期激增后放缓
summary: Growth in India’s obesity- and diabetes-drug market is losing steam just months after a surge triggered by the arrival of generic semaglutide products.

title: Euro Bears Return as Surging Oil Prices Test Currency’s Rebound
title_cn: 油价飙升测试货币反弹，欧元空头回归
summary: Traders are buying insurance against renewed weakness in the euro as climbing crude oil prices threaten last week’s rebound.

title: Ugandan Farmers to Challenge $5.6 Billion Pipeline
title_cn: 乌干达农民挑战 56 亿美元的管道
summary: A group of Ugandan farmers will file a lawsuit in the UK High Court against the East African nation’s crude pipeline, potentially delaying exports. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Turkey’s $37 Billion Defense Firm Says Foreign Orders Doubled
title_cn: 土耳其价值 370 亿美元的国防公司称外国订单翻了一番
summary: Turkey’s $37 billion state-run defense contractor Aselsan Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret AS said international orders have doubled in the past year on the back of demand fueled by the conflicts in Ukraine and the Middle East.

title: Japan Payment Processor Collapse Hits Banks, Restaurants
title_cn: 日本支付处理器崩溃影响银行和餐馆
summary: The bankruptcy of Zentoshin Co., an Osaka-based credit card payment processor, threatens both the regional banks which funded it as well as the small and medium-sized restaurants that relied on its services.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/8/2026 (Video)
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/8/2026（视频）

title: Hedge Funds Shake Off Brutal March for Best Half Since 2021
title_cn: 对冲基金摆脱残酷行进，迎来 2021 年以来最好的一半
summary: The brutal March that battered some of the world’s biggest hedge funds is already fading into the background as the firms reported their strongest first-half results in five years.

title: Private Placements Surge in Middle East on Iran War Volatility
title_cn: 伊朗战争动荡导致中东私募融资激增
summary: Private debt placements from the Middle East are surging as volatility due to the Iran war drives borrowers into alternative markets.

title: Alibaba’s Shares Jump Most in 10 Months as Earnings Hopes Grow
title_cn: 随着盈利希望增强，阿里巴巴股价创 10 个月来最大涨幅
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s shares surged the most since September, after investors turned optimistic on its earnings and shifted capital into major Chinese internet companies that had lagged the market.

title: Vistry Expects £30 Million Pretax Loss, CFO Steps Down
title_cn: Vistry 预计税前亏损 3000 万英镑，首席财务官辞职
summary: UK homebuilder Vistry Group Plc expects to report a loss before tax of about £30 million ($40.1 million) in the first half of the year as it races to raise cash.

title: Thai SEC Weighs Action Against Major True Corp. Investor
title_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会考虑对主要 True Corp. 投资者采取行动
summary: Thailand’s market regulator is considering legal action against an investor over inconsistencies in seven disclosure reports linked to six listed companies, including a nearly $1 billion acquisition of shares in telecom giant True Corp.

title: Iran Escalation Jolts Oil as Strait of Hormuz Risks Return | Insight 07/08/2026
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡风险回归，伊朗局势升级震动油价洞察 07/08/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Unite Group Offers Discounted Dorms in Bid to Ramp Up Sales
title_cn: Unite Group 提供宿舍折扣以提高销量
summary: The Unite Group Plc has begun offering discounted rents to some students as the landlord looks to boost reservations for the next academic year.

title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗并阻止石油销售
summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of its oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chip Startup SambaNova Raises Funds at $11 Billion Valuation
title_cn: AI芯片初创公司SambaNova融资估值110亿美元
summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.

title: AI Rotation Trade Sends Korean Stocks Tumbling, China Surging
title_cn: AI轮动交易导致韩国股市暴跌，中国股市飙升
summary: The AI rotation trade is gathering pace in Asia as investors pull money from the chipmakers that powered this year’s rally and hunt for cheaper ways to play the technology boom.

title: Labor Crunch Tests Growth Limits for US Data Center Builders
title_cn: 劳动力紧缩考验美国数据中心建设者的增长极限
summary: Following several quarters of record order books, a skilled-labor shortage is testing the limits of growth for the craft-labor providers who build data centers across the US.

title: Bolloré Wins Paris Court Ruling Over Vivendi Control Dispute
title_cn: Bolloré 赢得巴黎法院对维旺迪控制权纠纷的裁决
summary: Vincent Bolloré won a Paris ruling that could end up saving his company billions after judges backed his long-held claim that he didn’t control Vivendi SE before a split of the media conglomerate in 2024.

title: Apple Loses Spat With EU Over App Store and iPhone Rules
title_cn: 苹果在 App Store 和 iPhone 规则问题上与欧盟的争执败诉
summary: Apple Inc. lost a European Union court fight to stop its App Store and iPhone operating system being hit by the full-force of the bloc’s antitrust crackdown on Big Tech.

title: Goldman Sachs Says Hyperscalers Are 'Well-Positioned'
title_cn: 高盛表示超大规模企业“处于有利地位”
summary: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, managing director for portfolio strategy and asset allocation at Goldman Sachs, says the levered positioning toward semiconductors got a bit "extreme" and that the trend is reversing. "The hyperscalers are quite well-positioned right now because they still own a lot of the infrastructure," Mueller-Glissmann tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI to Roll Out Top AI Model Globally After Limited Preview
title_cn: OpenAI 将在有限预览后在全球推出顶级人工智能模型
summary: OpenAI is set to release its most advanced model widely on Thursday and is expanding its preview globally, the company said.

title: Temasek Assets Break $400 Billion as AI Bets Boost Returns
title_cn: 人工智能押注推动回报淡马锡资产突破 4000 亿美元
summary: Singaporean state-owned investor Temasek Holdings Pte is ramping up its exposure to artificial intelligence and the Americas, a shift which helped push its net portfolio value to S$518 billion ($401 billion) in the last financial year.

title: Netherlands and UK Sign $3.2 Billion Deal on Amphibious Ships
title_cn: 荷兰和英国签署价值 32 亿美元的两栖舰协议
summary: The Netherlands and the UK signed a £2.4 billion ($3.2 billion) agreement to produce new amphibious transport ships, part of a flurry of deals between European NATO members in Ankara.

title: Australian Pension Shrugs Off AI Bubble Fears, Plans to Buy Dips
title_cn: 澳大利亚养老金摆脱对人工智能泡沫的担忧，计划逢低买入
summary: UniSuper, one of Australia’s largest pension funds, is looking to buy any pullback in US technology stocks, shrugging off concerns over lofty valuations as it bets artificial intelligence will fuel years of earnings growth.

title: Chip Worker Shortfall Endangers US Factory Revival
title_cn: 芯片工人短缺危及美国工厂复兴
summary: A growing nationwide shortage of high-skilled workers threatens to delay construction of billions of dollars in new semiconductor plants across the US and constrain future chip production unless the industry pools resources and the government keeps up funding, according to a new report.

title: Iluvatar CoreX Is Said to Consider Share Sale After 428% Rally
title_cn: 据称 Iluvatar CoreX 在上涨 428% 后考虑出售股票
summary: Shanghai Iluvatar CoreX Semiconductor Co. is considering a share sale to raise at least $800 million in Hong Kong after soaring since its initial public offering in January, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Tencent WeChat AI Agent Shows Promise in Super-App Fight: Review
title_cn: 腾讯微信AI代理在超级应用之战中展现出前景：评论
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is fighting to restore its reputation as a tech innovator after falling behind in the race to develop groundbreaking frontier AI models. It’s taking an important step in that direction with Xiaowei: a prototype AI agent that it envisions eventually running errands for a billion-plus users across a WeChat ecosystem spanning millions of apps.

title: KKR-Backed SmartHR Is Said to Delay Tokyo IPO Beyond This Year
title_cn: KKR 支持的 SmartHR 据称将推迟今年东京首次公开募股
summary: Japanese human resources platform operator SmartHR Inc. has delayed its plans for an initial public offering to next year at the earliest as investors viewed the company’s targeted valuation as too high, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Samsung Scales Up Storage Production for Nvidia’s Vera Rubin
title_cn: 三星为 Nvidia 的 Vera Rubin 扩大存储产量
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has begun mass production of its most advanced data center storage drive, which is set for use inside Nvidia Corp.’s upcoming Vera Rubin platform.

title: Samsung to Get Jump on Apple’s First Foldable With New Phones in July
title_cn: 三星将于 7 月推出首款可折叠新手机，抢占苹果先机
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. will host its next Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, when the leading foldable phone maker is expected to unveil a Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a shorter and wider design that resembles Apple Inc.’s planned folding iPhone.

title: Billionaires Arrive for the Annual Sun Valley Conference
title_cn: 亿万富翁齐聚太阳谷年度会议
summary: Billionaires descend today on Sun Valley, Idaho, for the Allen & Co. annual gathering of media, technology and finance moguls. Some of the attendees include Hank Paulson, David Zaslav, Neal Mohan and Barry Diller. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Tumble on AI Anxiety | The Close 7/7/2026
title_cn: 芯片股因人工智能焦虑而暴跌收盘价 7/7/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Cboe Global Markets VP, Head of Derivatives Market Intelligence Mandy Xu, TeraWulf Chairman & CEO Paul Prager, CFRA Research Equity Research Analyst Keith Snyder, Former NATO Ambassador Kay Bailey Hutchison, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Jordan Jackson, Bernstein Research US Semiconductors Senior Analyst Stacy Rasgon, American Century Investments CEO Jonathan Thomas, Neuberger Private Markets Global Head Tony Tutrone, & Spring Health CEO & Co-Founder April Koh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s New Bonds Get Cooler Reception as AI Debt Floods Market
title_cn: 随着人工智能债务涌入市场，亚马逊的新债券受到冷遇
summary: When Amazon.com Inc. sold its biggest ever bond earlier this year, it was inundated with investor orders amid hype about the artificial intelligence boom. This time around there’s less fanfare.

title: Wall Street Unleashes Wave of Bullish SpaceX Ratings
title_cn: 华尔街掀起看涨 SpaceX 评级浪潮
summary: Wall Street’s biggest banks shopped SpaceX shares for $135 a pop during its record initial public offering. Just weeks later, sell-side analysts from many of those same banks are telling clients those shares should be worth $236 each on average.

title: TeraWulf CEO Excited About Anthropic Data Center Agreement
title_cn: TeraWulf 首席执行官对 Anthropic 数据中心协议感到兴奋
summary: TeraWulf CEO Paul Prager says a new 20-year lease agreement with Anthropic is a major vote of confidence in the company’s AI infrastructure strategy. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Prager also discusses plans for a purpose-built AI campus at TeraWulf’s Kentucky site and what the long-term partnership means for future growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democrats Aren't Obstacle For Clarity Act: Cuomo
title_cn: 科莫：民主党人不是澄清法案的障碍
summary:
Andrew Cuomo, former New York governor, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto."

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Andrew Cuomo Discuses Trump Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 安德鲁·科莫讨论特朗普的加密货币收益
summary:
Andrew Cuomo, former New York governor, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." President Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Strategist Highlights High Earnings Expectations Amid AI Sector Concentration
title_cn: 市场策略师强调人工智能行业集中度较高的盈利预期
summary: Jordan Jackson, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the approaching earnings season and the challenges posed by elevated market expectations. While S&P 500 earnings growth is projected at over 20% for the quarter, excluding technology sectors reduces growth estimates to around 11%, which still represents solid double-digit expansion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Slide as Oil Surges, Amazon Sets Jumbo Bond Sale
title_cn: 随着石油价格飙升，美国国债下滑，亚马逊推出巨额债券发售
summary: Treasuries fell as oil prices surged on signs of renewed threats to Middle East supply and Amazon.com led the corporate new-issue with an offering expected to raise at least $25 billion.

title: Traders Dump Tech Bonds to Make Room for Amazon Debt Deal
title_cn: 交易员抛售科技债券，为亚马逊债务交易腾出空间
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s massive bond sale dragged down hyperscaler debt on Tuesday as investors sold existing securities to fund the new issue, signaling growing fatigue over the barrage of artificial intelligence financings.

title: What China’s Latest Missile Test Reveals About Its Expanding Arsenal
title_cn: 中国最新的导弹试验揭示了其不断扩大的武库
summary: The high-profile launch of a nuclear-capable missile signals a new normal for China’s traditionally secretive military.

title: Bloomberg Crypto 7/7/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 7/7/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Ice-OKX Joint Venture Co-Chair & Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, Figure Co-Founder Executive Chairman Mike Cagney, BitGo CEO Michael Belshe, and Lyn Alden Investment Strategy Founder Strategist Lyn Alden. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Circle Under Pressure After Open USD Launch
title_cn: 美元开放后，Circle 面临压力
summary:
Bloomberg Intelligences Dushyant Shahrawat joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Circle shares fell dramatically on last week, after a consortium of firms across payments, finance, tech and crypto — including its distribution partner Coinbase Global Inc. — unveiled a new stablecoin that will compete with Circle’s own.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategy Sells $216M of Bitcoin as It Begins Overhaul
title_cn: Strategy 在开始改革之际出售了 2.16 亿美元的比特币
summary: Lyn Alden, founder strategist at Lyn Alden Investment Strategy, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Michael Saylor’s Strategy, which sold $216 million of Bitcoin last week, marking the first major step in the financing overhaul the company unveiled in recent days after a prolonged slump in the cryptocurrency and its own shares. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Belgian Foreign Minister Predicts 2-1 Win Against Spain in World Cup
title_cn: 比利时外长预测世界杯2-1战胜西班牙
summary: Belgian Foreign Minister Maxime Prevot discusses the controversy surrounding the national football team's match against US in the World Cup. He also looks ahead to Friday's quarter-final against Spain. "I hope that thanks to the presence of our King in the stadium, we will win 2-1," Prevot tells Bloomberg's Oliver Crook at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He's Not Happy With NATO About Greenland
title_cn: 特朗普表示他对北约关于格陵兰岛的问题不满意
summary: US President Donald Trump said Greenland "doesn't help Denmark, but it helps us." Speaking in Ankara, Turkey, alongside NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte, Trump added he is "very unhappy" with the alliance regarding the semi-autonomous Danish territory. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada Aims for Saudi Investment Deal This Year as Carney Visits
title_cn: 卡尼访问加拿大，今年力争与沙特达成投资协议
summary: Canada is aiming to sign an investment pact with Saudi Arabia in the coming months, as Prime Minister Mark Carney prepares to be the first Canadian leader in 26 years to visit the wealthy Middle Eastern nation.

title: Trump’s Greenland Obsession Returns: ‘Stupidly, We Gave it Back’
title_cn: 特朗普对格陵兰岛的痴迷卷土重来：“愚蠢的是，我们把它还给了”
summary: US President Donald Trump’s fixation with owning Greenland returned with a vengeance at the NATO summit as he launched into a series of broadsides against European allies for letting him down in Iran.

title: Trump Says Ceasefire Over Following Attacks on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗遇袭后停火
summary: President Donald Trump tells reporters that the tentative ceasefire between the US and Iran is "over," raising the prospect of a renewed military conflict between the two countries. "They're sick people. They're led by sick people, and they're vicious, violent people," Trump tells reporters. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports from Ankara, Turkey, where Trump is attending the NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jailed Indian Ordered Canada’s Sikh Activist Murder, US Says
title_cn: 美国称被监禁的印度人下令谋杀加拿大锡克教活动人士
summary: US prosecutors charged alleged Indian gang members with directing the 2023 assassination of a prominent Sikh activist in Vancouver, a killing which prompted a diplomatic crisis between India and Canada.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Over
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停火已经结束
summary: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire with Iran is over "as far as I’m concerned." He speaks during a press appearance in Ankara, where he is attending the 2026 NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US Ceasefire With Iran Is ‘Over’ After Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普称美国与伊朗的停火在袭击后“结束”
summary: US President Donald Trump said his tentative ceasefire with Iran is done, raising the prospect of a renewed military conflict between the two countries.

title: UK Seeks to Merge Defense Group With Canada’s ‘Bomb Bank’
title_cn: 英国寻求将国防集团与加拿大的“炸弹银行”合并
summary: The UK is talking with Canada about combining their defense financing initiatives, with neither reaching a critical mass of support for its plan.

title: Farage’s Election Gamble Risks Backfiring as UK Parties Boycott
title_cn: 由于英国政党抵制，法拉奇的选举赌博可能会适得其反
summary: Nigel Farage’s decision to quit Parliament and seek a fresh mandate for his seat put the Reform UK leader back where he’s happiest — at the center of Britain’s attention.

title: NATO’s $50 Billion Plan Seeks Deep-Strike Weapons Without US
title_cn: 北约500亿美元计划寻求在美国不参与的情况下进行深度打击武器
summary: The UK, France and Germany have launched a $50 billion NATO initiative to spur the development of long-range weapons without US involvement, aiming to close the gap in an area where Russia is well ahead.

title: NATO Considers Skipping 2027 Summit to Avoid Tensions With Trump
title_cn: 北约考虑跳过 2027 年峰会以避免与特朗普关系紧张
summary: NATO’s is considering foregoing next year’s annual summit, in part to reduce tensions with frequent critic US President Donald Trump and to avoid drawing attention to the host being one of the alliance’s lowest spenders.

title: Ghana Asks Ramaphosa to Defer Visit Over Anti-Immigrant Protests
title_cn: 加纳因反移民抗议要求拉马福萨推迟访问
summary: Ghana asked South African President Cyril Ramaphosa to postpone a proposed visit next month, after recent anti-immigrant protests in the southern African nation.

title: Belgium Says Europe Faces 'Wake-Up Call' on Ukraine
title_cn: 比利时称欧洲面临乌克兰问题“警钟”
summary: Belgian Foreign Minister Maxime Prevot discusses the fresh US strikes on Iran, Belgium's security role in the Strait of Hormuz, defense spending and the outlook for peace between Ukraine and Russia. He speaks to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Offers to Defuse EU Trade Clash After Landmark Nordic Trip
title_cn: 中国在具有里程碑意义的北欧之行后提出化解欧盟贸易冲突
summary: China laid out a path to addressing deepening frictions with Brussels by calling for boosting trade with the European Union as Foreign Minister Wang Yi wrapped up his charm offensive in Nordic countries.

title: Russia’s Saratov Refinery on Fire After Attack, Two Tankers Hit
title_cn: 俄罗斯萨拉托夫炼油厂遇袭起火，两艘油轮被击中
summary: Russia’s Saratov refinery caught fire after an overnight Ukrainian drone attack, while two tankers were also hit in the latest strikes targeting the country’s energy infrastructure.

title: US Strikes Iran & Blocks Oil Sales | Daybreak Europe 7/8/2026
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗并阻止石油销售|欧洲黎明 7/8/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, the US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of its oil. Iran says it hit an airbase in Kuwait and the Fifth Fleet naval base in Bahrain. Oil advanced, while bonds and stocks retreated after the flare-up in tensions.

The head of NATO says it's crucial that the US forcefully reacts when Iran violates the ceasefire. Mark Rutte was speaking as he arrived for the second day of the NATO summit in Turkey. US President Donald Trump will meet Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskyy today.

Today's guest: Camille de Courcel, BNP Paribas, Head of DM Rates Strategy and Economics, Europe (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farage's Ploy Diverts Attention From UK Leadership Transition
title_cn: 法拉奇的策略转移了英国领导层过渡的注意力
summary: Nigel Farage’s shock decision to quit as a Member of Parliament so he can win the support of voters in a by-election puts the poll-topping Reform UK leader back at the top of the news agenda just as Andy Burnham prepares to take over from Prime Minister Keir Starmer on July 20. Bloomberg Opinion’s Rosa Prince has the latest. Her views are her own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales in New Test of Truce
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗并阻止石油销售，这是新的休战考验
summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of its oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump to Meet NATO Leaders Following US Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗后特朗普将与北约领导人会面
summary: US President Donald Trump, Turkey’s Recep Tayyip Erdogan and other leaders are set to meet this morning on day two of the NATO Summit in Ankara. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook is on the ground with a preview of today's agenda, and the potential impact of the US strikes on Iran on the discussions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Hits Out at NATO Allies, Says Iran Ceasefire Over
title_cn: 特朗普猛烈抨击北约盟友，称伊朗停火结束
summary: A banner outside the NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum (NSDIF), in Ankara, Turkey. Photographer: Krisztian Bocsi/Bloomberg

title: Malaysia Rejects MP’s Request to Get Ex-Graft Chief’s Share Data
title_cn: 马来西亚拒绝国会议员获取前贪污腐败首领股份数据的请求
summary: Malaysia’s government rejected a lawmaker’s request for Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim to disclose former anti-graft agency chief Azam Baki’s shareholding records.

title: Michigan Democratic Senate Candidates Debate US-Israel Ties
title_cn: 密歇根州民主党参议员候选人辩论美以关系
summary: The two Michigan Democrats vying for their party’s nomination in a US Senate race clashed in a debate on Tuesday night over Middle East policy, focusing on America’s relations with Israel.

title: Maine Democrats Rule Out Platner Role in Picking Replacement
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人排除普拉特纳在挑选继任者中的作用
summary: Maine’s Democratic Party urged Graham Platner to immediately withdraw from the race for a US Senate seat following allegations of sexual assault and vowed he would have no role in selecting his replacement.

title: Modi Notches Up Global Honors With Another Medal From Indonesia
title_cn: 莫迪荣获印尼另一枚奖章，再添全球荣誉
summary: Another overseas trip, another state honor for Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

title: China’s ICBM Tests Point to New Normal Rattling the Pacific
title_cn: 中国的洲际弹道导弹试验预示着太平洋地区的新常态
summary: China’s test this week of a submarine-fired ballistic missile may mark the beginning of more regular Pacific launches as the country advances its arsenal for delivering nuclear warheads, unsettling governments already wary of Beijing’s military buildup.

title: Iran: To Take 'Decisive Actions' to Protect Interests | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/07/2026
title_cn: 伊朗：采取“果断行动”保护利益权力平衡：最新版 07/07/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Retired General Ben Hodges, former Commanding General for US Army Europe, says NATO allies should increase defense spending to strengthen their own security and counter Russia — not to satisfy President Trump. Bill Scher, Politics Editor for the Washington Monthly and longtime Democratic political strategist and commentator, says Graham Platner's refusal to leave Maine's Senate race could force Democrats into a "game of chicken" before a candidate deadline. Jonathan Panikoff, Senior Director of the Scowcroft Middle East Security Initiative at the Atlantic Council's Middle East Program, reacts to US strikes against Iran after attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Panikoff Says US, Iran Closer to War After Strikes
title_cn: 帕尼科夫称美国和伊朗在袭击后更接近战争
summary: Jonathan Panikoff, Senior Director of the Scowcroft Middle East Security Initiative at the Atlantic Council's Middle East Program, reacts to US strikes against Iran after attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. He says the US and Iran are "certainly closer" to war, though neither side likely wants a return to full-scale conflict, and warns each escalation makes it harder to restore the cease-fire. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategist: Democrats Must Quit Platner to Beat Collins
title_cn: 策略师：民主党必须退出普拉特纳才能击败柯林斯
summary: Bill Scher, Politics Editor for the Washington Monthly and longtime Democratic political strategist and commentator, says Graham Platner's refusal to leave Maine's Senate race could force Democrats into a "game of chicken" before a candidate deadline. He says the party still has a chance against Republican Senator Susan Collins, but only if it unifies around an alternative. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. General: NATO Spend Shouldn't Be About Pleasing Trump
title_cn: 先生。总则：北约支出不应该是为了取悦特朗普
summary: Retired General Ben Hodges, former Commanding General for US Army Europe, says NATO allies should increase defense spending to strengthen their own security and counter Russia — not to satisfy President Trump. He also says Ukraine's ability to strike deep inside Russia and target its oil-and-gas exports could create a path to victory, if sustained. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
